title: Announcing Google Antigravity SDK
summary: Google Antigravity is an agentic development platform that evolves the IDE into an agent-first era, enabling developers to manage agents across workspaces while maintaining a familiar AI IDE experience. Agents operate across the editor, terminal, and browser to autonomously plan and execute complex end-to-end tasks throughout the software development lifecycle.
